description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every pull request and push to the master branch. Use a matrix job strategy to run Tox sessions across multiple Python versions, including 3.10 with flake8, mypy, and py310 sessions, and sessions for Python 3.9, 3.8, and 3.7. For each session, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install tox, and run it with the specified session.
